Ministry Introduction

Raised as a Divine Commission

Drawn from the Hebrew הָיָה — to be, to exist, to become, and to come into manifestation.

2025
Ottawa Worship Experience
Our Story

A People of Becoming

HAYAH is a prophetic expression drawn from the Hebrew word הָיָה, meaning "to be, to exist, to become, and to come into manifestation." It is a word deeply rooted in Divine activity, revealing God as the One who not only is, but who causes things to be.

From the very beginning, in Genesis, creation itself responded to the voice of God — what He spoke became. This is the essence of Hayah. This same revelation is echoed in Exodus 3:14, where God reveals Himself as "I AM" — the Self-Existent One, the Eternal Source, and the God of manifestation.

Hayah International Ministries Inc. is therefore raised as a Divine commission to embody and proclaim this reality — to be a vessel through which the purposes of God are not only declared but birthed into manifestation.

✦
Awaken Identity
Bringing men into the revelation of who they are in Christ.
♦
Facilitate Transformation
Moving lives from potential into Divine manifestation.
◈
Establish God's Purposes
Seeing His will become reality in individuals, families, and territories.
❋
Demonstrate God's Word
Where what is spoken by God becomes tangible and evident.
Connect With Us →
Our Commission

Bridging Promise
and Manifestation

As a prophetic and apostolic ministry, Hayah International Ministries exists to bridge the gap between promise and manifestation — operating from Ottawa, Canada and the Middlebelt of Nigeria into the nations of the earth.

What God has spoken must not remain in the realm of prophecy — it must become.

Through the ministry of the Word, prayer, and the operation of the Holy Spirit, we are committed to raising a people who:

Live in the consciousness of divine possibility
Walk in spiritual authority
Manifest the life and nature of Christ on earth
Join the Movement →
Our Identity

We are a people of becoming.

Where destinies are activated
Where dry bones live again
Where light breaks forth out of darkness
Where God's eternal counsel finds expression in time
Serving from
Ottawa, Canada  ·  Makurdi, Nigeria
Reaching the nations of the earth
The Eternal Truth

We are not merely a gathering of believers —
we are a movement of Divine manifestation.

Called to reveal the reality of God in our generation and to see His Kingdom established on earth as it is in heaven. When God speaks, it must HAYAH — it must become.

Discover Our Mission & Vision →

Hayah Ministries International Inc.

A movement of Divine manifestation — called to reveal the reality of God in our generation. When God speaks, it must HAYAH.
